content: Canonical schema: tenants, sessions, skills, rate-limits, cost-tracking, audit. All use TENANT#{id} as PK. See ClawCore-Final-Architecture-Plan.md

title: Project codename: AWS Chimera
rationale: Multi-formed Greek creature reflects multi-tenant, multi-agent, multi-platform, self-evolving nature. AWS internal codename style (Bedrock, Mantle, Kuiper). CLI: chimera deploy/agent/skill.

content: A2A vs MCP protocols are complementary, not competing: MCP connects single agent to tools/data (vertical integration), A2A connects multiple agents to each other (horizontal coordination). Example: retail agent uses MCP for inventory DB queries, then A2A to coordinate with supplier agent for ordering.

name: aws-messaging-service-selection
description: SQS for task queuing with retries (pull-based), SNS for fan-out notifications (push-based), EventBridge for content-based routing and cross-account. Combine for complex workflows (EventBridge → SNS → SQS).

name: multi-agent-shared-memory
description: ElastiCache/Redis for sub-ms session state and distributed locks, DynamoDB for persistent state with strong consistency, S3 for large artifacts, EFS for shared filesystem. Choose based on latency and persistence needs.
